cursor.standing: The write gate COMMAND (recompile_gate.sh) proven and sealed — it pokes the door, reverts a stale model, and is non-blocking-but-loud-in-the-record.

window.standing: Fresh build as child a of the intentions-model-compiler ticket, to the shape the intentions/ store charter had specified as its unbuilt projector — two-tree gathering, born-timestamp ordering so the roots surface first, and content-embedding.

Built and proven: compiles the real repo's 17 intentions into intentions/_model.json with telos and the frame surfacing first by born timestamp; a measured finding drove the git --follow born source after plain first-add mis-dated the relocated roots.
The cairn compile CLI face (child b) landed the same day via cairn-command.

Write gate child c reworked: the FileChanged host hook was built then RETIRED (measured not to fire on any CC-produced write), and a nightly cron was installed then REMOVED as drift, both superseded by the event-driven write-through-in-skills contract plus a read-refresh callback backstop.
The write gate COMMAND (recompile_gate.sh) proven and sealed — it pokes the door, reverts a stale model, and is non-blocking-but-loud-in-the-record.
